description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a medium gray fabric, designed for spacious seating in communal or lounge areas. The sofa features a modern, minimalist aesthetic with clean lines and a low profile, supported by slender, black metal legs that elevate the frame. The seating area is divided into multiple individual seat cushions, each paired with a matching back cushion, all of which appear to be loose and generously padded for comfort. The left side of the sectional extends into a chaise lounge, providing ample space for reclining or stretching out. Both ends of the sofa are finished with straight, padded armrests that are level with the backrest, contributing to the streamlined silhouette. The upholstery is a solid color with a subtle woven texture, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame beneath the fabric.
description: A modern, L-shaped gray sectional sofa with loose cushions and black metal legs, featuring a chaise lounge and straight padded armrests. The upholstery is solid gray with a subtle woven texture.
description_view_0: The sofa is seen from an angle highlighting the L-shape and chaise lounge extension on the left, with all seat and back cushions visible.
description_view_1: This rear view shows the uniform row of back cushions and the continuous backrest, as well as the slim black legs supporting the sofa.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the chaise lounge section and the straight, padded armrest at the end, with the sofa's depth clearly visible.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the full seating arrangement, the sectional layout, and the even distribution of cushions across the sofa.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six individual seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with a chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests present at both ends, level with the backrest, featuring a simple rectangular profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Eight slender, straight black metal legs positioned at the corners and along the sectional's base, exposed and slightly inset from the edges for a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest segmented by six loose back cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement and providing uniform support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
